raw_consumer_statement: I became a victim of debit card theft on XX/XX/2024. Withdrawals were made to my account in XXXX, CA without my knowledge. Specifically, there was a withdraw of {$100.00} and XXXX withdraws for {$300.00}. As soon as I discovered these charges, I contacted American Express Serve Card to report the incident. They reassured me that they would conduct an investigation, which could take up to 45 days. On XX/XX/2024, before the theft occurred, my last transaction was at XXXX in XXXX, CA, where I spent a total of {$61.00}. It's worth mentioning that I live in XXXX, CA, which is approximately XXXX miles away from XXXX. However, I don't believe that American Express properly conducted their investigation. ATMs have cameras, so it would have been easy for them to verify my claim.
